revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŇŹk 4 h√īŐ§ (n√Ļng-lń≠k)]][[ja:7śúą4śó• (śóßśö¶)]][[ko:žĚĆŽ†• 7žõĒ 4žĚľ]][[zh-min-nan:7 goeŐćh 4 jiŐćt (kŇę-leŐćk)]][[zh-yue:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]][[zh:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŇŹk 4 h√īŐ§ (n√Ļng-lń≠k)]][[ja:7śúą4śó• (śóßśö¶)]][[ko:žĚĆŽ†• 7žõĒ 4žĚľ]][[zh-min-nan:7 goeŐćh 4 jiŐćt (kŇę-leŐćk)]][[zh-yue:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]][[zh:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŇŹk 4 h√īŐ§ (n√Ļng-lń≠k)]][[ja:7śúą4śó• (śóßśö¶)]][[ko:žĚĆŽ†• 7žõĒ 4žĚľ]][[zh-min-nan:7 goeŐćh 4 jiŐćt (kŇę-leŐćk)]][[zh-yue:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]][[zh:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŇŹk 4 h√īŐ§ (n√Ļng-lń≠k)]][[ja:7śúą4śó• (śóßśö¶)]][[ko:žĚĆŽ†• 7žõĒ 4žĚľ]][[zh-min-nan:7 goeŐćh 4 jiŐćt (kŇę-leŐćk)]][[zh-yue:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]][[zh:šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 4|qq=July 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=šłÉśúąŚąĚŚõõ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=žĚĆŽ†• 7žõĒ 4žĚľ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7śúą (śóßśö¶)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|RokuyŇć|ja|ŚÖ≠śõú|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyŇć|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|šĽŹśĽÖ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|TenpyŇć-hŇćji|en|TenpyŇć-hŇćji|qid=Q1346307|lt=TenpyŇć-hŇćji|1=TenpyŇć-hŇćji}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|757|en|757|qid=Q409717|lt=757|1=757}} ) ‚Äď The {{ill|Tachibana Naramaro Rebellion|ja|ś©ėŚ•ąŤČĮťļĽŚĎā„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Naramaro Rebellion|1=Tachibana no Naramaro Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11544227}} took place. {{ill|Tachibana no Naramaro|en|Tachibana no Naramaro|qid=Q7673717|lt=Tachibana Naramaro|1=Tachibana no Naramaro}} , son of {{ill|Tachibana no Moroe|en|Tachibana no Moroe|qid=Q3135863|lt=Tachibana no Moroe|1=Tachibana no Moroe}} , plotted to overthrow {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|qid=Q540305|lt=Fujiwara no Nakamaro|1=Fujiwara no Nakamaro}} , but his plan was discovered, and he was executed. * Year 5 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}} , {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ) ‚Äď The {{ill|Ministry of Finance (Japan)|ja|Ś§ßŤĒĶÁúĀ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ministry of Finance (Japan)|1=Ministry of the Treasury|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q910073}} issued {{ill|Chiken|ja|ŚúįŚął|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiken|1=land certificate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11424108}} , or land certificates, across Japan.
== Births == * Year 3 of {{ill|KeiŇć|en|KeiŇć|qid=Q776775|lt=KeiŇć|1=KeiŇć}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 3|en|August 3|qid=Q2786|lt=August 3|1=August 3}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) ‚Äď {{ill|Seiichi Kishi|en|Seiichi Kishi|qid=Q11475955|lt=Kishi Seiichi|1=Seiichi Kishi}} , politician (d. {{ill|1933|en|1933|qid=Q18726|lt=1933|1=1933}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|KajŇć|en|KajŇć|qid=Q1193892|lt=KajŇć|1=KajŇć}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}} , {{ill|1106|en|1106|qid=Q19508|lt=1106|1=1106}} ) ‚Äď {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|qid=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} , warrior (b. {{ill|1039|en|1039|qid=Q19341|lt=1039|1=1039}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}} , {{ill|1564|en|1564|qid=Q6632|lt=1564|1=1564}} ) ‚Äď {{ill|Miyoshi Nagayoshi|en|Miyoshi Nagayoshi|qid=Q1064909|lt=Miyoshi Nagayoshi|1=Miyoshi Nagayoshi}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyŇć|ja|śą¶ŚõĹŚ§ßŚźć|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyŇć|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}} (b. {{ill|1523|en|1523|qid=Q6302|lt=1523|1=1523}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|JŇćŇć (Edo period)|en|JŇćŇć (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=JŇćŇć|1=JŇćŇć (Edo period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1654|en|1654|qid=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}} ) ‚Äď {{ill|Prince Fushimi-no-miya Sadakiyo|ja|šľŹŤ¶čŚģģŤ≤ěśłÖŤ¶™Áéč|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Fushimi-no-miya Sadakiyo|1=Fushimi-no-miya Sadakiyo-shinnŇć|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11381089}} , 10th head of the {{ill|Fushimi-no-miya|en|Fushimi-no-miya|qid=Q1038337|lt=Fushimi-no-miya|1=Fushimi-no-miya}} family (b. {{ill|1596|en|1596|qid=Q6785|lt=1596|1=1596}} ). * Year 8 of {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=śėéŚíĆ|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=śėéŚíĆ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|1771|en|1771|qid=Q7686|lt=1771|1=1771}} ) ‚Äď {{ill|KatŇć Yasukazu|ja|Śä†Ťó§ś≥įŚģ¶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KatŇć Yasukazu|1=KatŇć Yasunobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11399357}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Niiya Domain|en|Niiya Domain|qid=Q109357353|lt=Niiya Domain|1=Niiya Domain}} (b. {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}} ).
== See Also ==
